message: Переработай дизайн под иммерсивный формат: экран-обзор компрессорных станций как на референсе — тёмный градиент фиолетовый→синий, крупные стекломорфные карточки станций с бейджем статуса, большой метрикой прокачки, sparkline-графиком и плитками метрик. Это новый главный экран SCADA-системы мониторинга газовых КС.
standaloneRequestQuery: Create an immersive dark SCADA dashboard overview screen as a React + TypeScript + Tailwind component named StationOverview for monitoring gas compressor stations. LAYOUT: full-height page, background = deep gradient from dark violet (#1a1530) top-left to dark navy (#0d1426) bottom-right with a subtle radial glow; very premium, technical, calm. TOP NAV BAR (slim): left = brand 'UTG' with a small flame logo mark; right = a pill language toggle 'UZ | RU' (RU active), plus ghost icon buttons for theme (sun), list view, notifications (bell), profile, and a hamburger menu. PAGE TITLE: 'Компрессорные станции' large semi-bold white. STATION CARDS: a vertical stack of large horizontal cards (rounded-2xl, glassmorphic: semi-transparent dark surface with a faint 1px glowing border and soft shadow), generous padding. Each card has 3 zones in a horizontal grid: (LEFT ~28%) station display name (e.g. 'КС «Ахангарон»') in white medium, a small status badge below it ('В работе' = green pill with dot / 'В резерве' = muted gray pill), and a primary metric block with a tiny uppercase label ('ПРОКАЧКА' or 'ТРАНЗИТ') above a very large bold white number (e.g. '18,33') followed by a small muted unit ('млн м³/сут'); (CENTER ~44%) a minimalist white line sparkline chart of the throughput trend, no axes, subtle, smooth; (RIGHT ~28%) three small metric tiles in a row, each a subtle rounded inset panel with uppercase micro-label and value: 'АГРЕГАТЫ 2/3', 'РВХ 1,65 МПа', 'РВЫХ 3,17 МПа'. The whole card is clickable (hover: border glow intensifies, slight lift) and calls onSelect(stationId). TYPOGRAPHY: condensed technical sans (like Barlow Condensed), tight uppercase micro-labels with letter-spacing, large numeric values use a clean font with tabular figures. ACCENTS: electric blue (#58A6FF) and emerald green (#3FB950) for status/positive, muted slate grays for secondary text. Make it a reusable component with TypeScript props: stations: Array<{ id:string; name:string; status:'running'|'reserve'; metricLabel:string; metricValue:string; metricUnit:string; units:string; unitsTotal:string; pIn:string; pOut:string; spark:number[] }>, lang:'UZ'|'RU', onSelect:(id:string)=>void, onLangChange?, onThemeToggle?. Render the sparkline inline with SVG (no external chart lib). Responsive: cards stack, zones wrap on narrow widths. Polished, immersive, production-quality.
